name: YouTube Shorts Faceless Video Bot v2

parameters.command:
=# Generate timestamp
TS=$(date +%s)
echo "TIMESTAMP=${TS}"

# Get the script text from n8n (this is the key fix)
SCRIPT_TEXT='{{ $json.scriptSafe }}'

# Validate script text is not empty
if [ -z "$SCRIPT_TEXT" ] || [ "$SCRIPT_TEXT" = "undefined" ]; then
  echo "ERROR: Script text is empty or undefined"
  exit 1
fi

# Write script to file using cat heredoc (avoids apostrophe issues with echo)
cat > /tmp/script_${TS}.txt << 'SCRIPTEOF'
{{ $json.scriptSafe }}
SCRIPTEOF

# Verify file was created
if [ ! -f /tmp/script_${TS}.txt ]; then
  echo "ERROR: Script file was not created"
  exit 1
fi

FILESIZE=$(stat -c%s /tmp/script_${TS}.txt 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
echo "DEBUG: Script file size = ${FILESIZE}"

if [ "$FILESIZE" -lt "10" ]; then
  echo "ERROR: Script file is too small (${FILESIZE} bytes)"
  exit 1
fi

# Run edge-tts with --file flag
/home/YOUR_USERNAME/.local/bin/edge-tts \
  --voice en-US-JennyNeural \
  --rate=+10% \
  --pitch=+0Hz \
  --volume=+0% \
  --file /tmp/script_${TS}.txt \
  --write-media /tmp/voice_${TS}.mp3 \
  --write-subtitles /tmp/subs_${TS}.vtt

# Verify voice was created
if [ ! -f /tmp/voice_${TS}.mp3 ]; then
  echo "ERROR: Voice file was not created"
  exit 1
fi

VOICE_SIZE=$(stat -c%s /tmp/voice_${TS}.mp3)
echo "DEBUG: Voice file size = ${VOICE_SIZE}"

if [ "$VOICE_SIZE" -lt "1000" ]; then
  echo "ERROR: Voice file too small (${VOICE_SIZE} bytes)"
  exit 1
fi

echo "TTS_DONE"

=TS="{{ $('Extract Timestamp').first().json.timestamp }}"
MUSIC="{{ $('Pick Random Music').item.json.musicFile }}"

if [ -z "$TS" ]; then
  echo "FATAL: Timestamp is empty"
  exit 1
fi

if [ -z "$MUSIC" ] || [ "$MUSIC" = "[undefined]" ]; then
  echo "FATAL: Music file missing"
  exit 1
fi

timeout 1800 bash /home/YOUR_USERNAME/assemble_video.sh "$TS" "$MUSIC" > /tmp/ffmpeg_log_${TS}.txt 2>&1 


echo "STARTED_PID=${PID}"
echo "TIMESTAMP=${TS}"

=TS={{ $('Extract Timestamp').first().json.timestamp }}
THUMB_TEXT='{{ $('Extract Timestamp').first().json.thumbnailSafe }}'

convert -size 1280x720 \
  -define gradient:angle=135 \
  gradient:'#0f0c29-#302b63' \
  -font /usr/share/fonts/truetype/dejavu/DejaVuSans-Bold.ttf \
  -pointsize 80 \
  -fill '#FF0000' \
  -stroke '#000000' \
  -strokewidth 3 \
  -gravity North \
  -annotate +0+80 'ALERT' \
  -fill white \
  -stroke '#000000' \
  -strokewidth 2 \
  -pointsize 60 \
  -gravity Center \
  -annotate 0 "$THUMB_TEXT" \
  -fill '#FFD700' \
  -pointsize 34 \
  -gravity South \
  -annotate +0+60 '#CyberSecurity #Hacking #Tech' \
  /tmp/thumb_$TS.jpg

echo "THUMB_DONE"
ls -lh /tmp/thumb_$TS.jpg

=TS="{{ $('Extract Timestamp').item.json.timestamp }}"
echo "DEBUG_TS=${TS}"
if [ -z "$TS" ]; then
  echo "FATAL: Timestamp is empty"
  exit 1
fi
if [ ! -f /tmp/final_${TS}.mp4 ]; then
  echo "FATAL: Video file not found"
  exit 1
fi
base64 -w 0 /tmp/final_${TS}.mp4
echo ""
echo "VIDEO_B64_DONE"

=TS='{{ $('Extract Timestamp').first().json.timestamp }}'

echo "DEBUG_TS=${TS}"
if [ -z "$TS" ]; then
  echo "FATAL: Timestamp is empty"
  exit 1
fi
if [ ! -f /tmp/thumb_${TS}.jpg ]; then
  echo "FATAL: Thumbnail not found"
  exit 1
fi
base64 -w 0 /tmp/thumb_${TS}.jpg
echo ""
echo "THUMB_B64_DONE"

updateFields.description:
=={{ $('Generate Script via Gemini').first().json.script + '

🔔 Subscribe for daily cybersecurity news!

' + $('Generate Script via Gemini').first().json.hashtags + '

#Shorts #YouTubeShorts #CyberSecurity' }}

parameters.command:
=TS='{{ $('Extract Timestamp').item.json.timestamp }}'

# Only cleanup if we got a YouTube video ID (meaning upload succeeded)
YT_ID='{{ $json.id || "" }}'

if [ -z "$YT_ID" ]; then
  echo "SKIP_CLEANUP: No YouTube ID found, upload may have failed"
  exit 0
fi

echo "Cleaning up files for TS=${TS}"

rm -f /tmp/*{{ $('Extract Timestamp').item.json.timestamp }}*


echo "CLEANUP_DONE"

=# --- FIX: Extract timestamp from the TTS node output, not search for random files ---
TS='{{ $('Generate Voice and Subtitles').first().json.stdout.match(/TIMESTAMP=(\d+)/)[1] }}'

VOICE_FILE="/tmp/voice_${TS}.mp3"
SUBS_FILE="/tmp/subs_${TS}.vtt"

echo "Expected TS: ${TS}"
echo "Checking: ${VOICE_FILE}"

if [ ! -f "$VOICE_FILE" ]; then
  echo "VALIDATION_FAILED: Voice file does not exist at ${VOICE_FILE}"
  exit 0
fi

VOICE_SIZE=$(stat -c%s "$VOICE_FILE")
VOICE_DURATION=$(ffprobe -v error -show_entries format=duration -of default=noprint_wrappers=1:nokey=1 "$VOICE_FILE" 2>/dev/null)

echo "VOICE_FILE=${VOICE_FILE}"
echo "VOICE_SIZE=${VOICE_SIZE}"
echo "VOICE_DURATION=${VOICE_DURATION}"

if [ "$VOICE_SIZE" -lt "50000" ]; then
  echo "VALIDATION_FAILED: Voice file too small (${VOICE_SIZE} bytes)"
  exit 0
fi

# Check duration is > 30 seconds
DURATION_INT=$(echo "$VOICE_DURATION" | cut -d. -f1)
if [ "$DURATION_INT" -lt "30" ]; then
  echo "VALIDATION_FAILED: Voice too short (${VOICE_DURATION}s)"
  exit 0
fi

# Check subtitles exist
if [ ! -f "$SUBS_FILE" ]; then
  echo "VALIDATION_FAILED: Subtitles file missing at ${SUBS_FILE}"
  exit 0
fi

echo "VALIDATION_PASSED"

=/bin/bash -c '
set -e

echo "DEBUG: Checking latest video..."

F=$(ls -t /tmp/final_*.mp4 2>/dev/null | head -1)

if [ -z "$F" ] || [ ! -f "$F" ]; then
  echo "STATUS=FAILED"
  echo "REASON=No video file"
  exit 0
fi

echo "VIDEO_FILE=$F"

# Get duration safely
DUR=$(/usr/bin/ffprobe -v error -show_entries format=duration -of csv=p=0 "$F" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)

if [ -z "$DUR" ]; then DUR=0; fi

DINT=$(printf "%.0f" "$DUR" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)

# Get file size
SZ=$(stat -c%s "$F" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)

# Get codecs safely
VID=$(/usr/bin/ffprobe -v error -select_streams v:0 -show_entries stream=codec_name -of csv=p=0 "$F" 2>/dev/null || echo "")
AUD=$(/usr/bin/ffprobe -v error -select_streams a:0 -show_entries stream=codec_name -of csv=p=0 "$F" 2>/dev/null || echo "")

echo "VIDEO_DURATION=${DINT}s"
echo "VIDEO_SIZE=${SZ}"
echo "VIDEO_CODEC=${VID}"
echo "AUDIO_CODEC=${AUD}"

# --- VALIDATION RULES ---

if [ "$DINT" -lt 30 ]; then
  echo "STATUS=FAILED"
  echo "REASON=Too short (${DINT}s)"
  exit 0
fi

if [ -z "$VID" ]; then
  echo "STATUS=FAILED"
  echo "REASON=No video stream"
  exit 0
fi

if [ -z "$AUD" ]; then
  echo "STATUS=FAILED"
  echo "REASON=No audio stream"
  exit 0
fi

if [ "$SZ" -lt 1000000 ]; then
  echo "STATUS=FAILED"
  echo "REASON=Too small (${SZ} bytes)"
  exit 0
fi

echo "STATUS=PASSED"
'

=URL_HASH="{{ $json.urlHash }}"
echo "DEBUG_HASH=${URL_HASH}"
if [ -z "$URL_HASH" ]; then
  echo "ERROR: urlHash is empty"
  exit 1
fi
if grep -qx "$URL_HASH" /home/YOUR_USERNAME/.yt_processed_urls.txt 2>/dev/null; then
  echo "ALREADY_EXISTS: $URL_HASH"
else
  echo "$URL_HASH" >> /home/YOUR_USERNAME/.yt_processed_urls.txt
  echo "MARKED_AS_PROCESSED: $URL_HASH"
fi
tail -200 /home/YOUR_USERNAME/.yt_processed_urls.txt > /tmp/urls_tmp.txt && mv /tmp/urls_tmp.txt /home/YOUR_USERNAME/.yt_processed_urls.txt
echo "TOTAL_PROCESSED=$(wc -l < /home/YOUR_USERNAME/.yt_processed_urls.txt)"

=TS="{{ $json.timestamp }}"
cat > /tmp/download_${TS}.sh << 'DLEOF'
{{ $json.downloadCmds }}
DLEOF
chmod +x /tmp/download_${TS}.sh
cat > /tmp/list_${TS}.txt << 'LISTEOF'
{{ $json.concatList }}
LISTEOF
echo "FILES_WRITTEN"
echo "DOWNLOAD_SCRIPT:"
cat /tmp/download_${TS}.sh
echo "CONCAT_LIST:"
cat /tmp/list_${TS}.txt

=TS="{{ $('Extract Timestamp').first().json.timestamp }}"

LOG="/tmp/ffmpeg_log_${TS}.txt"
FILE="/tmp/final_${TS}.mp4"

echo "CHECKING_LOG=$LOG"
echo "CHECKING_FILE=$FILE"

# ----------------------------
# 1. LOG MUST EXIST
# ----------------------------
if [ ! -f "$LOG" ]; then
  echo "VALIDATION_FAILED: FFmpeg log missing"
  exit 1
fi

CONTENT=$(cat "$LOG")

# ----------------------------
# 2. HARD FAIL CONDITIONS (ABORT IMMEDIATELY)
# ----------------------------

if echo "$CONTENT" | grep -q "More than 1000 frames duplicated"; then
  echo "VALIDATION_FAILED: FFmpeg corrupted encode (frame duplication)"
  exit 1
fi

if echo "$CONTENT" | grep -q "cpb: bitrate max/min/avg: 0/0/0"; then
  echo "VALIDATION_FAILED: Invalid bitrate detected"
  exit 1
fi

if echo "$CONTENT" | grep -q "Error" || echo "$CONTENT" | grep -q "Invalid"; then
  echo "VALIDATION_FAILED: FFmpeg error detected"
  exit 1
fi

# ----------------------------
# 3. CHECK FINAL FILE EXISTS
# ----------------------------
if [ ! -f "$FILE" ]; then
  echo "VALIDATION_FAILED: Video file not created yet"
  exit 1
fi

# ----------------------------
# 4. FILE SIZE CHECK
# ----------------------------
SIZE=$(stat -c%s "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)

if [ "$SIZE" -lt 1000000 ]; then
  echo "VALIDATION_FAILED: Video too small (${SIZE} bytes)"
  exit 1
fi

# ----------------------------
# 5. OPTIONAL: CHECK IF STILL WRITING
# ----------------------------
SIZE2=$(stat -c%s "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
sleep 2
SIZE3=$(stat -c%s "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)

if [ "$SIZE2" != "$SIZE3" ]; then
  echo "VALIDATION_FAILED: Video still writing"
  exit 1
fi

echo "VIDEO_READY"
exit 0

=TS="{{ $('Extract Timestamp').first().json.timestamp }}"

if [ -z "$TS" ]; then
  echo "FATAL: Timestamp missing"
  exit 1
fi

FILE="/tmp/final_${TS}.mp4"

if [ ! -f "$FILE" ]; then
  echo "FATAL: Video missing"
  exit 1
fi

SIZE=$(stat -c%s "$FILE")

echo "DEBUG: File size = $SIZE"

if [ "$SIZE" -lt 1000000 ]; then
  echo "FATAL: Video too small"
  exit 1
fi

# Output clean JSON for n8n
echo "{"
echo "\"data\": \"$(base64 -w 0 "$FILE")\","
echo "\"fileName\": \"final_${TS}.mp4\","
echo "\"mimeType\": \"video/mp4\""
echo "}"

=TS="{{ $('Extract Timestamp').first().json.timestamp }}"

if [ ! -f /tmp/final_${TS}.mp4 ]; then
  echo "FATAL: Video missing"
  exit 1
fi

base64 /tmp/final_${TS}.mp4

=TS="{{ $json.timestamp }}"

FILE="/tmp/final_${TS}.mp4"

if [ ! -f "$FILE" ]; then
  echo "FATAL: File not found"
  exit 1
fi

echo "LOADING_VIDEO=${FILE}"
base64 "$FILE"

=TS="{{ $('Extract Timestamp').first().json.timestamp }}"
TITLE="{{ $('Parse Script Response').first().json.title }}"
CAPTION="${TITLE} #cybersecurity #hacking #infosec #databreach #technews #shorts"

if [ -z "$TS" ]; then
  echo "FATAL: Timestamp is empty"
  exit 1
fi

if [ ! -f /tmp/final_${TS}.mp4 ]; then
  echo "FATAL: Video file /tmp/final_${TS}.mp4 not found"
  exit 1
fi

if [ -z "$TITLE" ] || [ "$TITLE" = "undefined" ]; then
  CAPTION="Cybersecurity News #cybersecurity #hacking #infosec #shorts"
  echo "WARN: Title was empty, using default caption"
fi

timeout 300 python3 /home/YOUR_USERNAME/tiktok_upload.py "/tmp/final_${TS}.mp4" "$CAPTION" "/home/YOUR_USERNAME/.tiktok_cookies.json" > /tmp/tiktok_log_${TS}.txt 2>&1
TIKTOK_EXIT=$?

echo "TIMESTAMP=${TS}"
echo "EXIT_CODE=${TIKTOK_EXIT}"

if grep -q "TIKTOK_UPLOAD_DONE" /tmp/tiktok_log_${TS}.txt 2>/dev/null; then
  echo "TIKTOK_SUCCESS"
else
  echo "TIKTOK_FAILED"
  echo "LOG_OUTPUT:"
  cat /tmp/tiktok_log_${TS}.txt 2>/dev/null | tail -15
fi
